meaning: n.肥皂;Simple Object Access Protocol,简单对象访问协议
examples: He had soap suds in his ears.
Use a soap that is mild on the skin.
Make sure you rinse all the soap out.
Bars of olive-oil soap share counter space with piles of lokum (Turkish Delight) and slabs of amber-hued honeycomb.
An international team of scientists has demonstrated the first soap that responds to magnets.
